title: Mini Project: Plan Your App
description: Write a Python program that prints a menu with 4 project options. Let the user pick one (1-4). Print a confirmation message: 'You selected: [Project Name]'
starterCode:
print("=== Choose Your Project ===")
print("1. Student Management System")
print("2. Expense Tracker")
print("3. Quiz Application")
print("4. To-Do List")

choice = int(input("Enter choice (1-4): "))

# Print confirmation
solution:
print("=== Choose Your Project ===")
print("1. Student Management System")
print("2. Expense Tracker")
print("3. Quiz Application")
print("4. To-Do List")

choice = int(input("Enter choice (1-4): "))
projects = ["", "Student Management System", "Expense Tracker", "Quiz Application", "To-Do List"]
print(f"You selected: {projects[choice]}")

testCases.label: Pick option 3
testCases.expectedOutput:
=== Choose Your Project ===
1. Student Management System
2. Expense Tracker
3. Quiz Application
4. To-Do List
Enter choice (1-4): You selected: Quiz Application
